title: Compact Disc
description: The shiny frisbee your parents used to listen to music, install games, or desperately try to burn a mix for their crush. Scratches? Just blow on it and pray.

title: Floppy Disk
description: That weird save icon in your app? It was a real thing! Held 1.44MB—just enough for one pixel of a TikTok. Also doubled as a wobbly ninja star.

title: Napster
description: The OG music pirate ship. Made your dial-up scream for hours just to download one song, then got sunk by angry rock stars.
